news.title:
Ather Energy Ltd to participate in HSBC Global Investment Summit 2026 in Hong Kong on April 16.
Discussions will be based on public info; no UPSI will be shared during the meeting.
news.summary:
Ather Energy Ltd to participate in HSBC Global Investment Summit 2026 in Hong Kong on April 16.
Discussions will be based on public info; no UPSI will be shared during the meeting.

news.title:
Ather Energy hits Rs 809, up 4.95%, marking a new all-time high.
Stock outperformed Sensex, which declined 0.77% on the same day.
news.summary:
Ather Energy hits Rs 809, up 4.95%, marking a new all-time high.
Stock outperformed Sensex, which declined 0.77% on the same day.

news.title:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: National Aluminium, NLC India, Honasa Consumer, Ather Energy, and Aurobindo Pharma.
Nifty 50 fell 2.1% to 22,819.6; Sensex dropped 2.3% to 73,583.2 amid weak sentiment and geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: National Aluminium, NLC India, Honasa Consumer, Ather Energy, and Aurobindo Pharma.
Nifty 50 fell 2.1% to 22,819.6; Sensex dropped 2.3% to 73,583.2 amid weak sentiment and geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
India auto registrations in March rose 27% to 1.254M units, boosting Nifty Auto Index by 2.2%.
Tata Motors overtakes M&M in PV segment; Maruti retains 41.4% share. Ather leads E2W sales, beating Ola Electric.
news.summary:
India auto registrations in March rose 27% to 1.254M units, boosting Nifty Auto Index by 2.2%.
Tata Motors overtakes M&M in PV segment; Maruti retains 41.4% share. Ather leads E2W sales, beating Ola Electric.

news.title:
PLI scheme gaps flagged; Ather Energy excluded due to strict eligibility criteria.
Panel suggests flexibility for EV startups, boosting prospects for Ather Energy.
news.summary:
PLI scheme gaps flagged; Ather Energy excluded due to strict eligibility criteria.
Panel suggests flexibility for EV startups, boosting prospects for Ather Energy.

news.title:
8 of 15 startups listed in 2025 now trade below issue price, impacted by market volatility and reassessed profitability.
Lenskart, Groww, Meesho, Ather Energy outperform marginally; geopolitical tensions and aggressive IPO pricing weigh on investor sentiment.
news.summary:
8 of 15 startups listed in 2025 now trade below issue price, impacted by market volatility and reassessed profitability.
Lenskart, Groww, Meesho, Ather Energy outperform marginally; geopolitical tensions and aggressive IPO pricing weigh on investor sentiment.

news.title: Ather Energy's CEO affirms no EVs below ₹1 lakh, avoiding price wars.
news.summary: Ather Energy's CEO affirms no EVs below ₹1 lakh, avoiding price wars.

news.title:
Auto firms like Ashok Leyland, TVS Motor, Bajaj Auto, and Ather Energy face margin pressures due to rising metal costs.
Precious metals surged 35-65% YoY; firms plan price hikes, cost cuts, and product mix strategies to offset inflation impact.
news.summary:
Auto firms like Ashok Leyland, TVS Motor, Bajaj Auto, and Ather Energy face margin pressures due to rising metal costs.
Precious metals surged 35-65% YoY; firms plan price hikes, cost cuts, and product mix strategies to offset inflation impact.

news.title:
Aditya Infotech, Ather Energy, and others delivered up to 133% gains post-IPO, showcasing strong returns in 1 year.
Tech, EV, and growth-focused IPOs outperformed, while mega-issues like Tata Capital saw subdued results amid market volatility.
news.summary:
Aditya Infotech, Ather Energy, and others delivered up to 133% gains post-IPO, showcasing strong returns in 1 year.
Tech, EV, and growth-focused IPOs outperformed, while mega-issues like Tata Capital saw subdued results amid market volatility.

news.title:
Ather Energy witnessed a block deal of 32.78 lakh shares, 0.85% equity, worth ₹233 crore.
The shares were traded at ₹710 per share during the block deal.
news.summary:
Ather Energy witnessed a block deal of 32.78 lakh shares, 0.85% equity, worth ₹233 crore.
The shares were traded at ₹710 per share during the block deal.

news.title:
Ather Energy refrains from revealing monthly volume needed for EBITDA breakeven.
The EL Platform is expected to boost margins despite possible product cannibalization.
news.summary:
Ather Energy refrains from revealing monthly volume needed for EBITDA breakeven.
The EL Platform is expected to boost margins despite possible product cannibalization.

news.title:
Ather Energy foresees commodity risks affecting P&L by a few percentage points.
They plan cost reductions of 10-20% in mechanical and manufacturing over 4-6 quarters.
news.summary:
Ather Energy foresees commodity risks affecting P&L by a few percentage points.
They plan cost reductions of 10-20% in mechanical and manufacturing over 4-6 quarters.

news.title:
Ather Energy reports 53% revenue growth in Q3 FY26 with 68,000 units sold.
The company plans to expand its retail presence to 700 stores.
news.summary:
Ather Energy reports 53% revenue growth in Q3 FY26 with 68,000 units sold.
The company plans to expand its retail presence to 700 stores.

news.title:
Ather Energy's Co-CEO warns of challenges in 2023 due to rising commodity costs.
Reduction in EV incentives also adds to the hurdles for Ather Energy this year.
news.summary:
Ather Energy's Co-CEO warns of challenges in 2023 due to rising commodity costs.
Reduction in EV incentives also adds to the hurdles for Ather Energy this year.

news.title:
Ather Energy's board approved Q3 FY26 results and allotted 4.94 lakh ESOP shares.
A new wholly owned subsidiary was established in Hong Kong; audit found no misstatements.
news.summary:
Ather Energy's board approved Q3 FY26 results and allotted 4.94 lakh ESOP shares.
A new wholly owned subsidiary was established in Hong Kong; audit found no misstatements.

news.title:
Ather Energy establishes Hong Kong unit to enhance procurement operations.
The move aims to improve efficiency and strengthen supply chain management.
news.summary:
Ather Energy establishes Hong Kong unit to enhance procurement operations.
The move aims to improve efficiency and strengthen supply chain management.

news.title:
Ather Energy's Q3 net loss narrows to 846M INR from 1.97B INR YoY.
Revenue rises to 9.5B INR in Q3, up from 6.35B INR YoY.
news.summary:
Ather Energy's Q3 net loss narrows to 846M INR from 1.97B INR YoY.
Revenue rises to 9.5B INR in Q3, up from 6.35B INR YoY.

news.title:
111 firms, including Adani Enterprises, NMDC, and Bajaj Finance, to release Q3FY26 results on Feb 3.
Key names include Adani Ports, Varun Beverages, Pidilite, Solar Industries, and Mankind Pharma.
news.summary:
111 firms, including Adani Enterprises, NMDC, and Bajaj Finance, to release Q3FY26 results on Feb 3.
Key names include Adani Ports, Varun Beverages, Pidilite, Solar Industries, and Mankind Pharma.

news.title:
Ather Energy Ltd's board meeting is scheduled for February 2, 2026.
The meeting will review and approve Q3 and nine-month results ending December 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Ather Energy Ltd's board meeting is scheduled for February 2, 2026.
The meeting will review and approve Q3 and nine-month results ending December 31, 2025.

news.title:
Ola Electric's sales dropped 51.1% in CY25 with 199,318 units sold, compared to 407,700 units in CY24.
Ather Energy overtook Ola Electric as per FADA's annual sales data for electric two-wheelers.
news.summary:
Ola Electric's sales dropped 51.1% in CY25 with 199,318 units sold, compared to 407,700 units in CY24.
Ather Energy overtook Ola Electric as per FADA's annual sales data for electric two-wheelers.
